## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy and priorities for SentinelOne's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New priority focus: AI cybersecurity content, driven by CEO's desire to strengthen SentinelOne's position in this space](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [CVE database remains a key priority; proposal to be reviewed by security research team](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [CS 101 content deprioritized; existing content undergoing internal PMM audit](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop proposal combining CVE database and AI cybersecurity focus](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Priorities

  - [Shift in focus to AI cybersecurity content, as requested by CEO Tomer](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [CVE database remains a priority; security research team to review proposal](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [CS 101 content deprioritized; SEO agency focusing on this area](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Products and solutions pages (high-conversion) remain important](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### AI Cybersecurity Focus

  - [CEO wants SentinelOne to be known as strong in AI cybersecurity space](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Suggestion to create campaign page under solutions area](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Approach: Develop supporting content in CS 101 section + separate campaign page](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Integrated campaign approach: SEO, paid, and PR efforts](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### CVE Database Development

  - [Proposal shared; awaiting review from Mahati and security research team](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Need to align on page template and data sources](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [GrowthX has in-house dev and design teams available to assist](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [GrowthX demonstrated Atlas platform for AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Process includes SEO research, brief generation, and human editing](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Capability to customize workflows and integrate company-specific information](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)

### Team Coordination

  - [Need to schedule meetings with key stakeholders: Brian Law, Ali Kramer, Tim](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Rick (senior copywriter) to be added to Slack channel for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Joshua finalizing brand messaging by August 15th](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mahati to review CVE database proposal with security research team](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop combined proposal for CVE database and AI cybersecurity focus](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Schedule meetings with Brian Law, Ali Kramer, and Tim](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Add Rick to Slack channel for writing alignment](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin research on AI cybersecurity content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Await Joshua's finalized brand messaging (due August 15th) for further refinement](https://fathom.video/share/WA9WySAs6fkycvJsNRr8BVAPouNPvSKK?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
